positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical, circular mandala design featuring interwoven mystical botanicals, geometric line work, and celestial elements. The central motif is a glowing crescent moon embraced by stylized, glowing ferns and ethereal vines. The composition must be centered and self-contained, designed to repeat flawlessly on fabric. Style should be neo-art nouveau mixed with intricate sacred geometry, utilizing a deep navy blue, emerald green, and gold foil color palette. Use strong, crisp silhouettes, perfect line work, and dramatic halo-like backlighting against a dark background to ensure maximum contrast and print visibility. Isolated, vector quality, high contrast.
negative: blur, artifacts, grainy, low detail, text, watermark, signature, logo, cropped, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, writing, messy, realistic photo
